targets.expr:
sum by(instance, job) (irate(node_cpu_seconds_total{mode="system",job="$Server"}[1m]))
/
count by(instance, job) (node_cpu_seconds_total{mode="system",job="$Server"})
* 100

sum by(instance, job) (irate(node_cpu_seconds_total{mode="user",job="$Server"}[1m]))
/
count by(instance, job) (node_cpu_seconds_total{mode="user",job="$Server"})
* 100

sum by(instance, job) (irate(node_cpu_seconds_total{mode="iowait",job="$Server"}[1m]))
  /
count by(instance, job) (node_cpu_seconds_total{mode="iowait",job="$Server"})
  * 100

sum by (instance, job) (irate(node_cpu_seconds_total{mode=~".*irq",job="$Server"}[1m]))
/
count by (instance, job) (node_cpu_seconds_total{mode="irq",job="$Server"})
* 100

sum by(instance, job) (irate(node_cpu_seconds_total{mode="idle",job="$Server"}[5m]))
  / 
count by(instance, job) (node_cpu_seconds_total{mode="idle",job="$Server"})
  * 100

sum by(instance, job) (
  irate(node_cpu_seconds_total{mode=~"user|system",job="$Server"}[1m])
)
/
count by(instance, job) (node_cpu_seconds_total{mode="user",job="$Server"})
* 100
